channel.title: Abhay Pratap Singh — Senior Backend Engineer & Team Lead
channel.description: Backend engineer building scalable SaaS platforms and AI-powered systems
channel.copyright: All rights reserved 2026, Abhay Pratap Singh

item.title: How I Design Systems: My Engineering Philosophy
item.description: The principles behind my architecture decisions — from monolith vs microservices to multi-tenant isolation and LLM integration.
item.author: abhaysingh4feb@gmail.com (Abhay Pratap Singh)

item.title: Designing a Secure LLM-to-SQL Pipeline
item.description: How I built a natural language to SQL system that handles prompt injection, schema validation, and query sandboxing — processing 20M+ records in production.
item.author: abhaysingh4feb@gmail.com (Abhay Pratap Singh)

item.title: Building Semantic Search with PostgreSQL and pgvector
item.description: Why I chose pgvector over dedicated vector databases, and how to implement production-grade semantic search without leaving PostgreSQL.
item.author: abhaysingh4feb@gmail.com (Abhay Pratap Singh)

item.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture: Row-Level vs Schema-Level Isolation
item.description: A practical comparison of tenant isolation strategies, and why row-level isolation with middleware-based context propagation worked for our 100+ tenant platform.
item.author: abhaysingh4feb@gmail.com (Abhay Pratap Singh)

item.title: Orchestrating 20+ Third-Party APIs Without Losing Your Mind
item.description: Lessons from integrating ERP, shipping, marketing, and payment APIs into a single e-commerce platform.
item.author: abhaysingh4feb@gmail.com (Abhay Pratap Singh)
